setup_task.sh line 11 and setup_avare.sh line 22 specify the package name; https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ds.avare confirms this is the official Avare package

privileged_info_summary: The task involves downloading and displaying FAA approach plate data for San Francisco International Airport (KSFO) using the Avare aviation GPS application. KSFO is the official ICAO identifier for San Francisco International Airport. 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM' is the official FAA Terminal Procedures Publication terminology for approach plate diagrams. The data comes from real FAA sources (Terminal Procedures Publication/d-TPP), not synthetic data. Avare provides over 13,000 geo-referenced approach plates organized by airport. The task expects the agent to download plates via the Download Manager, navigate to the Plates viewer, search for KSFO, and display the Airport Diagram, which should show text including 'KSFO', 'SAN FRANCISCO', and 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM'.
